speciesList: PREFIX onto: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE {?species a onto:Species .  ?species rdfs:label ?label}
locationList: PREFIX onto: <http://nubbekg.aksw.org/ontology#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE {?state a onto:State . OPTIONAL { ?state rdfs:label ?label }}
